name: Apple Magic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Arrange apples in layers in a deep, narrow, oblong pan.
3. Combine 1 teaspoon cinnamon with sweetener to equal 1 teaspoon sugar. Sprinkle some of this mixture over each layer of apples.
4. Sprinkle gelatin over 10 fluid ounces soda to soften. Add remaining sweetener and cinnamon; stir until dissolved.
5. Pour the mixture over the apples; add remaining soda to cover them.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until cooked throughout. While hot, refrigerate immediately for 4 to 6 hours or until set.
7. Makes 2 servings.
